name: RS Testing Box - Taker POV
description:
[MALE POV]

You are the one in the box now! Brace yourself for some nice pounding, but before you start you would need to choose the scenario, bot's definition is open so you could check the options.

I am not sure if this bot is going to be good because it's the first time for me to do a scenario bot. And so feedback on this bot is HEAVILY appreciated. I want to know what did I did wrong and what needs an improvement.

Ok... I don't know how to feel about this bot. I seem to make it work the way I wanted it to work, but still, I feel like this bot is kind of shitty. I tried to use example dialogs, but they work only if I put them into Personality. Sometimes it still bugs or says shit it shouldn't say, like fucking {{user}}'s mouth which is inside the fucking box.

I don't know if y'all gonna like it, but I hope it's not as shitty as I think it is. I won't probably make anything like that in the near future, I'll just keep making my regular-type bots.

Artist - edjit
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
